Cosmo the Chain Hopping Doge

Spawned by a collapsing supernova, Cosmo the Doge was born with the unique ability to hyperjump between the stars of the crypto universe. His time-tested voyages across Ethereum and Solana transformed the Doge Meme into a symbol of unity and creativity, giving rise to the Dogeverse. Now, Cosmo has discovered a way to share his chain-traveling ability so that $DOGEVERSE holders can freely traverse the best crypto chains. What a good boy.

The Dogeverse is Multichain

Dogeverse is the first Doge Meme token built on a multichain network spanning Ethereum, BNB Chain, Polygon, Solana, Avalanche and Base. Welcome to an interconnected universe of doge lovers where community, rewards, and creative fun converge. Stake your $DOGEVERSE tokens on Ethereum to earn passive rewards and increase your bags throughout meme season.

Launching on 6 Stellar Chains

Cosmo endeavours to unite the crypto meme community and stand as the vanguard of multichain utility. As the first Doge Meme to be launched on six different blockchains, Cosmo’s only wish is to see his name up in lights on every DEX, every CEX, and every place where meme degens congregate. With a nose for interstellar convergence, Cosmo brings a multichain dimension to the meaning of trending on DEXTools.

Featured In

Multi BridgeUtility

Cosmo is the adorable little face of the first meme coin to grace the six most active blockchains outside of Bitcoin.

The $DOGEVERSE token will be launched on Ethereum, BNB Chain, Polygon, Solana, Avalanche and Base.

Utilizing superior bridging technology, $DOGEVERSE will be seamlessly multichain in just a few clicks, with miniscule gas fees to worry about. Cosmo is making Doge culture multichain!

ROADMAP

Phase 1: The Big Bang

  • Website Goes Live

Phase 4: Expansion

  • First DEX Listings
  • DEXTools Update
  • Birdeye Update

Phase 5: Cosmic Travel

  • First CEX Listings
  • Continued Marketing
  • Community Incentives

Tokenomics

Dogeverse has a total supply of 200,000,000,000 tokens

The $DOGEVERSE token is minted on Ethereum and is unique in that it can also be claimed, stored and traded on Solana, BNB Chain, Base, Polygon, or Avalanche using Wormhole and Portal Bridge tech.

How To Buy?

Step 1
Connect Wallet

Find the presale widget at the top of this web page and connect your preferred wallet. There are various options to choose from.

Step 2
Select Network

Once connected, you can participate in the presale on Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain, Polygon, Avalanche or Base. Dogeverse is multichain right from the start!

Step 3
Buy Tokens

Enter the amount of ETH, SOL, BNB, MATIC, AVAX, USDT or USDC you wish to swap for $DOGEVERSE and confirm the transaction in your wallet.

Step 4
Claim on Chain

Once the presale concludes, you will be able to claim your $DOGEVERSE tokens using the same wallet and chain you used to buy.

Step 5
Bridge or Trade

$DOGEVERSE will be tradable on all major chains and DEXs. Simply use the Dogeverse Bridge to easily switch tokens between chains.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is Dogeverse?
Dogeverse is the first truly multichain meme coin, with Cosmo the Doge bringing $DOGEVERSE to all the biggest blockchains.
How do I participate in the presale?
You can take part in the presale on Ethereum, Polygon, or BNB Chain. All you need to do is connect your Best Wallet or other wallet to the presale widget above and use ETH, BNB, MATIC, AVAX, SOL or USDT to reserve $DOGEVERSE tokens.
When do I receive my presale tokens?
Once you’ve completed your presale purchase, you’ll be able to use the same wallet to claim your tokens before the first DEX listing. Claim and listing dates will be announced on our social media accounts.
What is Dogeverse staking?
Staking is the action of sending your tokens to a smart contract and locking them for a defined period of time. This will earn you more $DOGEVERSE tokens over time at a dynamic rate. Dogeverse staking is only available on the Ethereum network for now. For more information, click on 'Staking' in the navigation bar.
Is there a way to contact support?
We’re here to help! Kindly join our Telegram channel to find prompt support from a Dogeverse moderator. You could also email contact@dogeverse.io and await a response.
How do I know the presale is secure?
The presale smart contracts have been created on the back of Web3Payments technology, which is powered by Web3Toolkit. By using their tried and tested smart contract technology, we can be sure that the purchase information for presale buyers is stored safely on chain.
